items.description: Waterproof Rain Jacket with taped seams, hood; designed for 通勤雨天, 戶外徒步. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 防水雨衣外套，特色：taped seams、hood；適用於通勤雨天、戶外徒步。風格安全、實穿多變。
Windbreaker with light shell, elastic hem; designed for 騎行通勤, 晨跑. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 抗風外套，特色：light shell、elastic hem；適用於騎行通勤、晨跑。風格安全、實穿多變。
Down Jacket with baffled quilting, packable; designed for 冬季保暖, 旅行. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 羽絨外套，特色：baffled quilting、packable；適用於冬季保暖、旅行。風格安全、實穿多變。
Insulated Vest with synthetic fill, zip front; designed for 秋冬層次, 戶外活動. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 保暖背心，特色：synthetic fill、zip front；適用於秋冬層次、戶外活動。風格安全、實穿多變。
Softshell Jacket with stretch shell, fleece back; designed for 登山健行, 城市通勤. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 軟殼外套，特色：stretch shell、fleece back；適用於登山健行、城市通勤。風格安全、實穿多變。
Hardshell Jacket with waterproof membrane, helmet hood; designed for 高山登山, 暴雨環境. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 硬殼外套，特色：waterproof membrane、helmet hood；適用於高山登山、暴雨環境。風格安全、實穿多變。
Fleece Jacket with microfleece, zip front; designed for 露營, 通勤保暖. Safe, tasteful, versatile. ｜ 刷毛外套，特色：microfleece、zip front；適用於露營、通勤保暖。風格安全、實穿多變。
